q_quant_rationale: The analysis compares campaign vs non-campaign days (two observed groups) rather than comparing observed to an expected/baseline/typical value, and no fold/percent deviation from an expectation is named.
q_aware_rationale: The analysis correctly reports 6.722 vs 6.259 orders/day with n=72 and n=293, and provides an inconclusive verdict (direction favors hypothesis but evidence insufficient).
